repair_summary: Fixed the handling of separator within UMI/CB fields by adjusting the reconstruction logic after rsplit(maxsplit=2). Now correctly extracts UMI and CB fields even when they contain the separator, using fallback to combine last two parts when the last part does not start with 'UMI'.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include at least one test where separator appears within the last two fields.
Scaled executable cases must include at least one test with bytes input.
Scaled executable cases must include tests for invalid UMI and invalid cell barcode (e.g., too short, invalid characters).
Scaled executable cases must include a test that explicitly checks the order of the returned tuple.
